1.content:
Welcome to the story! In this tale, our harem hero, Marco Diaz, sees the world from the perspective of a puny insect and has to survive while surrounded by all of the ladies he's come to know, who are all much bigger than him. But right now, the question is which kind of size-changing story path are we going to start with. Will it be:

1. The Incredible Shrinking Marco (with only one giantess).
2. Macro Giantess Story.
3. Fantastic Voyage Plot.
4. Other kind of Giantess story. Or maybe;
5. Crossover story - Marco is shrunken and transported into a different show with that shows' female characters.
1.title: Marco Diaz's Shrunken Adventures!

11.content:
In this path, Marco is the only one who becomes tiny and he only has to face one giantess. There are a few choices to decide on how that turns out like if the giantess is aware of him or not, or if she is gentle or not. So here are a few options for the story:

1. Marco shrinks himself intentionally - Marco finds Star's wand and uses it to make himself small to explore the world from a bug's perspective. Note: he can be shrunken by Star's wand or any other means. That goes for all of them.

2. Star accidentally shrinks Marco - Star makes Marco tiny by accident and is completely oblivious of him. Can be around any girl, not just Star. Can also include stomp, body exploration, vore or anything else.

3. Someone shrinks Marco on purpose - A girl makes Marco tiny on purpose with the intention of using him however she wants. Can include mouth play, foot play (he is indestructible), giantess pleasure, and smothering.

4. Marco is just born at 1 inch tall and has to live in a world of giantess people who love him at his natural, tiny size and do whatever they want with him; playing with him like a real toy, using him to pleasure them, eating him and spitting him out unharmed, or anything else to do with a tiny boy. Note: this is inspired by the interactive story, "Minizora Mayhem," by "Lonely Wanderer."
11.title: Shrinking Marco.

15.content:
It was another normal day in the peaceful town of Echo Creek. Well, as normal as it can get when the new exchange student is a magical, spell-casting, monster-fighting, reckless and highly hyperactive princess from another dimension.

Star was in her giant makeshift bedroom at the Diaz's house working on some of her new magic skills. "Glistening Neon, Mega Narwhal Blast!!!" she shouted, as she pointed her wand at a target at the end of her room. Out of the wand came a flying narwhal, with the only difference being that it shined like neon lights as it flew at the target, which left star a little flash blinded by the lights. The narwhal made an impact with the bullseye and explode like a velvet light show, complete with glittery sparkles. "Ooh, pretty," Star said with the same anime-like glistening in her own eyes.

"Star! Can you keep it down with the magic? I'm trying to study here!" Marco exclaimed barging into Star's room with an annoyed look on his face. "Sorry Marco, just testing out my new spell skills," she replied.

"Well can you try to be a little more quiet about it, please?" he asked. "Yeah, alright Marco. But I can't help it. My new spells are so amazing, I can't hold back my curiosity." "I've noticed." Marco said, looking at the mess caused by her uncontrolled spell casting.

"Hey Marco. I've got a new idea." Star said. "I'm afraid to ask what is." Marco sighed. Star pointed her wand at Marco, to which, Marco's face grew scared and immediately knew what she was thinking. "Oh no Star. I don't want a repeat of *gulp* "the monster arm* incident." Marco cringed recalling the time Star tried to fix his arm with magic, which had less than satisfying results. "Don't worry Marco. I'm just gonna change your skin color a little bit. You'll look like a pretty rainbow, it'll be fun." She said, but it didn't make Marco feel any safer.

Star's wand powered up and fired directly at Marco. Marco screamed as the magical beam enveloped his whole body and vibrated him like a tuning fork. Star was expecting him to change in his colors but became quickly confused by what happened next. Instead of changing skin color, Marco, still covered in the magic blue aura, started slowly decreasing in his height until he was so small, he was unnoticeable. And before he became as small as a flea, Marco suddenly disappeared as the magic faded.

*Gasp* "Oh no! Marco. What have I done?!" Star screamed as Marco was nowhere to be seen from where he recently stood.

Marco blanked out once he was hit by the magic beam and when it was over, he was left unconscious. It was almost a half hour before his brain started to turn itself back on. Marco was still passed out on the floor and in a few seconds, his senses came back as he started waking up. "Oh man my head. That was some spell Star used on me," Marco said holding his head as he got his bearings back.

He got up still disoriented from the shock and shook his head to finally get his head together. "Star. You know, you really should take it easy on the..." he paused in shock. Marco's train of thought was interrupted as his vision cleared and he noticed he wasn't in Star's room anymore. For that matter, he realized he wasn't even in his own house anymore. "What the? This isn't Star's room. Where am I?"

Marco looked around and saw that he was in a new location that seemed unfamiliar to him. Everything looked different from his own home. But the biggest difference was that everything in his new surroundings looked gigantic. All of the furniture towered miles above him while the walls and ceiling were even farther away from him. It was then that Marco realized what happened to him. "Wait a minute. No, this can't be. I've... I've... I SHRUNK!" he screamed.

Marco realized that Star's spell must have shrunken him to a very tiny size and also teleported him somewhere far away from his house. He estimated himself to be about an inch or two tall. His mind raced with question as he looked at his current location. The giant furniture in the room made him feel like a common insect. But that wasn't the only thing on his mind right now. If he was shrunk in someone else's house, then the inhabitants of that house will definitely be gigantic to him as well.

Marco is shrunken in another TV show outside of "Star vs. the Forces of Evil." Which animated show is Marco shrunken in?
15.title: Crossover story.

155333333333333.title: Next.

155333333333333333.content: I was looking through Wikipedia for cartoons from 2000-2009. Shall we put Marco in a cartoon from 2010-2020 or shall we switch from here and move on to anime girls or girls from animated movies instead? What'll it be?
155333333333333333.title: Something else.

1553333333333333331.content: Now going into the next decade of our time. Which show does Marco find himself in now?
1553333333333333331.title: Next decade, 2010-2020.

choices: Tara Duncan and the Evil Empress.

1553333333333333332.title: Anime.

15533333333333333323.title: Enough with the magical girls.

info.brief_description: Marco Diaz gets shrunken while surrounded by the "BIG" girls in his life.
info.description:
Direct from "Star vs. the Forces of Evil," Marco Diaz is shrunken to the size of an ant (roughly between 0.5 inches-1 inch tall). Now Marco goes on dangerous tiny adventures while at the mercy of all of the gigantic, normal-sized girls in his life, who are all completely unaware of his tiny presence.

Marco was pretty much the only choice for this considering the fact that he's the fandom's coveted harem master to all of the show's female characters.

Some of my ideas for this story, I've gained inspiration which came from these fan fictions from BiggerBetterBarbie:
https://www.deviantart.com/biggerbetterbarbie/art/Star-vs-The-Forces-of-Evil-Sta...
https://www.deviantart.com/biggerbetterbarbie/art/SvTFoE-Star-You-Shrunk-the-Tee...
https://www.deviantart.com/biggerbetterbarbie/art/SvTFoE-Star-You-Shrunk-the-Adu...

Rules:
1. There are two options: either Marco shrinks to bug size or any girl on the show grows gigantic.
2. For shrinking, ONLY Marco gets shrunken, no other shrinking males. Interaction is F/Marco only.
3. In the giantess path, one or more girls grow to giant size, and keep Marco as their buddy.
4. Please use correct grammar, spelling, and punctuation.
5. While shrunken, all of the giantess girls are to stay unaware of the tiny Marco unless there is the option that he actually gets their attention.
6. Oral Vore, Mouth play, Stomp, Body exploration, Endosoma, Nasal Vore, Breast Play, and Hair forest are all allowed.
7. Forbidden: Scat, Toilet Stuff, Anal Vore, Hard Vore, Sex, Unbirth
8. Marco cannot die and is indigestible.
9. Do not end the story.
10. No one sentence chapters.
11. Original Characters (OC) are allowed. Please be descriptive about their looks and character.
